svg.aria-label: AWS GCP Cloud Updates January 2026 EC2 G7e X8i Bangkok Region Sovereign Cloud
svg.title: AWS GCP Jan 2026: EC2 G7e/X8i, Bangkok Region, Sovereign Cloud

g.text: NVIDIA Blackwell B200 - 8x performance vs H100
X8i SAP-certified - 16TB memory - in-memory DB tier
3 AZ - low latency for SE Asia financial sector
Gemini 3 Flash model - BigQuery edge analytics
BigQuery - Cloud Run - Vertex AI all available
GDPR-aligned - EU-only key management - isolated control
French - German - Italian datacenter regions covered
FedRAMP - IL5 - BSI C5 compliance roadmap aligned
